scripts.dev:old: bun run relay & sleep 1 && bun run migrate && bun run contextvm & bun --hot src/index.tsx
scripts.dev:fake: bun run relay & sleep 1 && bun run scripts/seed.ts && bun run contextvm & bun --hot src/index.tsx
scripts.dev:no-seed: bun run relay & sleep 1 && bun run contextvm & bun --hot src/index.tsx
scripts.tauri:dev: bun run relay & sleep 1 && bun run migrate && bun run contextvm & tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live bun run build && RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:mac: RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live bun run build && RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:mac:arm: RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live bun run build && RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:mac:x64: RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live bun run build && RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:win: RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live bun run build && RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.tauri:build:linux: RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live bun run build && RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.tauri:android: adb reverse tcp:3000 tcp:3000; adb reverse tcp:3334 tcp:3334; RELAY_URL=ws://localhost:3334 bun run build && bun run relay & sleep 1 && bun run contextvm & RELAY_URL=ws://localhost:3334 TAURI_DEV_HOST=127.0.0.1 tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:android:build: RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live bun run build && RELAY_URL=wss://relay.wavefunc.live tauri android build
